title: coix ovata
intro: Coix ovata, also known as Job's Tears or Chinese Pearl Barley, is a type of annual grass belonging to the family Poaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Coix ovata include reducing cholesterol levels, improving digestion, and alleviating symptoms of insomnia and anxiety. Coix ovata can be prepared as a herbal tea, decoction, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
